name: vercel-ai-inline-citation
title: Inline Citation
author: Vercel
description: An inline citation trigger with an accessible hover card and multi-source carousel.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing and icon direction for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing and icon direction for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
